title: Mod Idea Designer (Frontend): Form + List with React Query and Themed UI

requirements.summary: Add a mod idea designer form (Title, Description, Game/Platform, Tags) with inline validation and success/error feedback, saving via backend.
acceptanceCriteria: The form prevents submission when required fields (Title, Description) are empty and shows inline validation messages in English.
Submitting a valid form calls the backend create method and resets the form on success.
The UI shows a clear error message when the backend returns an error or the call fails.

file_operations.description: Create the ModIdeaForm component with controlled inputs for Title, Description, Game/Platform, and Tags (comma-separated -> string[]), inline English validation, submit handling, and success/error feedback UI using shadcn-ui form primitives (e.g., Input/Textarea/Button/Alert/Card composition). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a workshop-style page container that hosts the form and the list view together (single page), providing shared layout, header copy (English), and consistent spacing using Tailwind + shadcn-ui Card/Separator composition. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the new ModIdeaWorkshopPage into the app as the primary view so users can access the mod idea form and submit ideas without needing additional routes.

requirements.summary: Add a mod idea list view with newest-first rendering, empty/loading/error states, truncation with expand/collapse, and client-side filtering by Game/Platform and/or tag.
acceptanceCriteria: On page load, the app fetches mod ideas from the backend and renders them newest-first.
Each mod idea card shows Title, Game/Platform, Tags, and Created date; description is truncated by default with a user control to expand/collapse.
If there are no mod ideas, the UI shows an empty state message in English (e.g., "No mod ideas yet").
The list has a simple client-side filter by Game/Platform text and/or tag text (case-insensitive).

file_operations.description: Create ModIdeaList to render mod ideas as themed cards (Title, Game/Platform, Tags, Created date, truncated Description preview) with per-item expand/collapse control, and English empty state. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Badge/Button/Collapsible or Accordion) by composition only. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create lightweight client-side filter UI (Game/Platform text and Tag text) with case-insensitive matching and clearable inputs; use shadcn-ui Input/Button composition and ensure all user-facing text is English. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire ModIdeaFilters and ModIdeaList into the workshop page layout and connect filter state to the rendered list (no backend filtering).

requirements.summary: Use React Query for fetching and creating mod ideas with cache invalidation so the list updates immediately after creation.
acceptanceCriteria: The list query is implemented with React Query and shows loading and error states in English.
The create mutation invalidates/refetches the mod idea list query on success.
No direct fetch logic is duplicated outside React Query for these operations.

file_operations.description: Implement React Query hooks for mod ideas: a list query calling the backend actor's getAllModIdeas and a create mutation calling createModIdea; include query keys and cache invalidation on successful create (invalidate/refetch the list query).
Use the React Query list hook to fetch mod ideas on load (render loading/error states in English) and pass results to ModIdeaList.

Use the React Query create mutation to submit the form; on success reset form fields and rely on query invalidation so the list updates without manual refresh; show English error messages for failed calls.

requirements.summary: Apply a coherent creative "mod workshop" theme across the app using Tailwind + shadcn composition with a non-blue/purple-dominant palette.
acceptanceCriteria: All primary UI surfaces (header, form, list/cards, empty/loading/error states) share a consistent theme (palette, type scale, spacing).
Theme does not rely on blue/purple as the dominant palette unless explicitly requested later.
Uses existing shadcn UI components by composition (no edits to immutable UI component sources).

file_operations.description: Adjust global theme tokens and base styles to establish a consistent "mod workshop" look (e.g., warm/industrial neutrals with accent colors not dominated by blue/purple), including typography defaults and background/foreground variables used by Tailwind/shadcn classes.

Extend Tailwind theme (only via config) to support the chosen workshop palette/typography/spacing (e.g., custom semantic color variables or additional shadows) while preserving shadcn variable-driven color mapping.

Apply consistent themed layout styling across header, form, list, and empty/loading/error states using Tailwind utility classes and shadcn-ui Card/Badge/Alert composition (no edits to immutable shadcn component sources). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
